input: Run client prospecting on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected client prospecting output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the client prospecting workflow

input: Apply client prospecting to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive client prospecting analysis with evidence-tagged findings

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to client prospecting
